text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Dance is all about keeping with the<n>rhythm. If you
want it to look polished<n>and beautiful...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Step, one, two... huff. Step... puff, one, two.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Teehee! ♪ You see, dancing comes<n>naturally to a
princess!
